center.name: Nils Carl Gustaf Fersen Gyldenstolpe
center.summary: Nils Carl Gustaf Fersen Gyldenstolpe是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Bamboo antshrike、Chestnut-throated spinetail、雀歌百灵，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bamboo antshrike (Cymbilaimus sanctaemariae) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-throated spinetail (Synallaxis cherriei) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is mainly found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The monotonous lark (Mirafra passerina) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in southern Africa
